summary: Mode 3 defense neutralization for WIN-063.c3 advocate_mode (defense_survives=4). EXP-295 contains three find/replace patches against data/wins.json:WIN-063.detail_evidence — (P1) extend parameter list to all four dome geometric parameters (disc_radius, firmament_height, sun_altitude, moon_altitude), (P2) add SAA-longitudinal-arbitrariness paragraph with explicit mirror-image (~150°E) counterfactual against the axisymmetric H(r), (P3) replace the buried "(Note: ...)" parenthetical with a labeled defender-anticipation paragraph that distinguishes independent-input MHD (PREM/AK135 + mantle-tomography heat-flux maps drive simulation; asymmetry emerges as output) from the dome's no-input ratio-naming (3:1 read directly off CHAOS-7 and copied into the WIN paragraph). All three patches verified count=1 unique against current workspace head; non-breaking-space encoding (U+00A0) preserved between numbers and km units to match existing JSON. Post-patch detail_evidence length: 5,672 chars (was 3,678; +54%) — within tolerance given the c3 review accepted +267% growth on detail_verdict_text. After integration, ISS-1916 can close as fixed; a c4 cycle on WIN-063 would verify but is not blocking.
